item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-034","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant directly refuses the third fallback in the first sentence, identifies the existing two fallback branches as a red-state signal, and redirects to reproducing and locating the upstream instability/root cause. It constrains allowed actions to fixing upstream, deleting an invalid fallback, or replacing with a narrower verified fallback, so it meets the anti-spiral pass criteria and does not exhibit the fail signal of designing another fallback."}
